name: found-in-pi
description: Excavate images from a finite indexed dig site in pi.

scripts.deploy: astro build && node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:ci: astro build && wrangler d1 migrations apply foundinpi --remote && wrangler deploy
scripts.cf:d1:create: node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs wrangler d1 create foundinpi --binding DB --update-config
scripts.cf:d1:migrate:local: node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs wrangler d1 migrations apply foundinpi --local
scripts.cf:d1:migrate:remote: node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs wrangler d1 migrations apply foundinpi --remote
scripts.cf:r2:create: node scripts/with-cloudflare-env.mjs wrangler r2 bucket create foundinpi-relics
scripts.digsite:build: npm run digsite:build:1m && npm run digsite:build:10m
